title: Which fund isn't really diversifying?
intro: You hold a core flexi-cap. These five 'diversifier' funds report their top-holding overlap with it.
prompt: Tap the fund whose overlap makes it a lookalike, not a diversifier.
debrief: An 81% overlap means Fund C is buying nearly the same names as your core — adding it stacks single-stock risk instead of spreading it. 'Many funds' is not 'many independent bets.'
